name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖GG👉The 'Gucci Cosmogonie' series made its debut at the historic Castello di Monte Castello in Italy. On the runway, aesthetic elements from different eras and locations complemented each other, connecting the past with the present. This new crescent-shaped shoulder bag is a runway piece, drawing inspiration from the brand's vintage elements. It is crafted from soft leather and features the double-G logo that appeared in the 1970s. Brown soft leather, shiny gold-tone accessories. Interior: 1 zip pocket. This bag comes with an extra shoulder strap that can be fastened to the bag with a buckle, and an adjustable shoulder strap with a double-G magnetic snap closure.
